artPrompt: Narrative page, no text. Soft dawn after battle; Elara kneeling; companions resting; child reaches toward First Riftling. Mud and names mood. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Mud took bootprints. The Riftstone took names.

lines.speaker: Healer
lines.text: We can raise walls. Or we can raise Keepers.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: Raise Keepers who know which wall is a cradle.
